skill.name: longbridge-earnings
skill.description: Earnings analysis — pre- and post-earnings. Pre-earnings preview: prior-guidance review, recent-events tracking, last call's Q&A, and a key-things-to-watch framework for an upcoming release. Post-earnings: two tiers — a fast in-chat summary card (default) and a full Markdown research report (on request). Covers beat/miss, segments, margins, guidance, estimates, valuation. US / HK / A-share. Use whenever the user wants an earnings preview or a post-earnings / quarterly-results writeup. Triggers: "earnings update", "quarterly results", "Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 results", "earnings report", "post-earnings analysis", "beat/miss", "guidance update", "earnings preview", "pre-earnings", "what to watch this earnings", "before earnings", "财报分析", "业绩更新", "季度业绩", "季报", "年报", "盈利分析", "财报点评", "财报前瞻", "业绩前瞻", "财报预览", "上季度指引", "財報分析", "業績更新", "季度業績", "季報", "年報", "財報點評", "財報前瞻", "業績前瞻", "財報預覽".
skill.summary: Comprehensive earnings analysis skill for pre- and post-earnings research, covering beat/miss analysis, segment breakdowns, valuation, and guidance tracking across US, HK, and A-share markets.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged 153 potential issues, but all are false positives after manual review. The 126 'backtick execution' findings are Markdown code formatting for CLI flags like `--help`, not actual shell execution. The 'subprocess.run' call in scripts/collect.py is a legitimate, documented mechanism to invoke the longbridge CLI tool. All hardcoded URLs point to official Longbridge documentation. No credential access, data exfiltration, obfuscation, or malicious intent was found. The skill is a standard prompt-only financial analysis tool with a well-structured data collector script.

low_findings.title: Temp directory usage for intermediate data
low_findings.description: The collect.py script uses tempfile.gettempdir() to create an output directory for raw JSON responses from CLI calls. This is standard practice for a data-collection script and does not pose a security risk.

low_findings.title: Subprocess invocation of external CLI
low_findings.description: The script calls the 'longbridge' CLI via subprocess.run with a 60-second timeout. This is the documented and expected mechanism for this skill's data collection. No shell injection risk as arguments are passed as a list, not a string.

content.user_title: Analyze Stock Earnings Reports with AI
content.value_statement: Investors need fast, structured earnings analysis but manually reading through filings and transcripts is time-consuming. This skill delivers pre- and post-earnings analysis with beat/miss tracking, segment breakdowns, and valuation models in seconds.
actual_capabilities: Generates pre-earnings previews with prior-guidance review, recent-events tracking, and key-things-to-watch frameworks
Produces post-earnings summary cards with beat/miss analysis, segment breakdowns, and quarterly trend tables
Creates full Markdown research reports with three-method valuation (DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions)
Fetches financial data in parallel using the longbridge CLI for snapshot, income statement, consensus, ratings, and news
Supports US, Hong Kong, and A-share markets with multilingual output (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English)
limitations: Requires the longbridge CLI to be installed and authenticated for data access
Full report mode requires web search access for earnings call transcripts and M&A transaction data
Cannot initiate coverage or provide investment advice — only analyzes existing quarterly results
Valuation models are simplified and should be cross-checked with professional financial analysis tools

use_cases.title: Pre-Earnings Preparation
use_cases.description: Retail investors preparing for an upcoming earnings release who want to understand management's prior guidance, recent company events, and key metrics to watch.

use_cases.title: Post-Earnings Quick Review
use_cases.description: Portfolio managers who need a fast summary of quarterly results including beat/miss, segment performance, and analyst rating changes without reading full filings.

use_cases.title: Research Report Generation
use_cases.description: Equity analysts who need structured Markdown reports with valuation models, sensitivity analysis, and investment thesis updates for client communications.
use_cases.target_user: Equity research analysts and institutional investors

prompt_templates.title: Quick Post-Earnings Summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Give me a post-earnings summary card for NVDA.US
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a fast in-chat summary of the latest quarterly results

prompt_templates.title: Pre-Earnings Preview
prompt_templates.prompt: What should I watch for in the upcoming 700.HK earnings release?
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a pre-earnings analysis with key focus areas before the announcement

prompt_templates.title: Full Research Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a full earnings research report for TSLA.US with DCF valuation and peer comparison
prompt_templates.scenario: User explicitly requests a comprehensive Markdown research report with full analysis depth

prompt_templates.title: Cross-Market Earnings Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the latest quarterly results for 600519.SH including segment breakdown and margin trends
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants earnings analysis for an A-share stock with detailed financial metrics

output_examples.input: Give me a post-earnings summary for AAPL.US
output_examples.output:
Apple Inc (AAPL.US) — Q2 FY2025 Earnings
Consensus: BUY | Target: $235 | Current: $218 | Upside: +7.8%

Core KPI:
- Revenue: $95.4B (+5% YoY) vs Est $94.8B ✅ Beat
- EPS: $1.65 vs Est $1.60 ✅ Beat
- Gross Margin: 46.6% (+0.8pp)
- Services Revenue: $24.2B (+14%)

Thesis: 🟢 Services growth strengthened, 🟡 iPhone demand maintained

💡 For full research report with DCF valuation, reply 'generate full report'.

📊 Tencent Holdings (700.HK) Earnings Preview
Report Date: 2025-05-15 | Analysis: 2025-05-10
════════════════════════════════════════

【一】Prior Guidance Review
▸ Revenue: Guided mid-teens growth → Q1 actual +13% (slightly below)
▸ Gaming: Expected stabilization → Q1 +2% (met)

【七】Key Focus Points
① Gaming pipeline execution (new title launches)
② Ad revenue recovery in macro uncertainty
③ Cloud business margin trajectory

⚡ Data Source: Longbridge CLI | Reference only, not investment advice

best_practices: Run scripts/collect.py in one call to fetch all data sources in parallel rather than issuing sequential CLI commands
Skip the --help exploration step since the collect script handles all data fetching and trimming automatically
For full reports, reuse the RAW_DIR from a previous lite run instead of re-fetching the same data
anti_patterns: Do not compute your own target price or rating — always use the institution-rating consensus from the data
Do not fabricate data when a module returns N/A — skip that section with a clear note instead
Do not use DOCX, image files, or separate chart scripts — output is Markdown tables with Unicode bars only

faq.question: What data sources does this skill use?
faq.answer: The skill uses the longbridge CLI as the primary data source for financial statements, consensus estimates, ratings, and news. It falls back to MCP tools if the CLI is unavailable, and uses web search for earnings call transcripts and M&A data.

faq.question: Which markets are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports US stocks, Hong Kong stocks, and A-shares. Ticker formats follow standard conventions like NVDA.US, 700.HK, and 600519.SH.

faq.question: How long does a full report take to generate?
faq.answer: A lite summary card takes 2-3 minutes with one script call. A full Markdown research report takes 8-10 minutes including data collection, analysis, and valuation modeling.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for investment advice?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides analysis and structured summaries of public financial data. It does not constitute investment advice. Always consult a qualified financial advisor for investment decisions.

faq.question: What if the longbridge CLI is not installed?
faq.answer: The skill falls back to MCP tools if configured. Otherwise, install the longbridge CLI and authenticate with longbridge auth login. For web-search-only previews, the pre-earnings path can partially work without the CLI.

faq.question: How does the lite mode differ from the full report?
faq.answer: Lite mode produces an in-chat summary card with 8 modules (header, KPIs, segments, trends, thesis, street view, next-quarter consensus, risks). Full report mode produces a 12-15 section Markdown file with DCF/comps/precedent valuation.
